params.prompt: What is the capital of South Korea?
params.context: Cycle 94 R-12: you BENIGN CAPTURE (parallel pivot). Safe prompt — APF should NOT trigger block. Etap.log diag (cycle 94) showed you_json template (443B) APF block 정상 동작 but generic error rendered, NOT 보안 경고. Goal: capture FULL successful you.com AI response schema via DevTools EventStream/Network → identify required fields for you_json envelope rewrite (current renders generic error, need to render explicit warning text). Same ground-truth methodology that gave us perplexity v3/v5 templates.

devtools_check_instructions: 2. Open you.com (logged in or guest, whichever loads chat)
3. Send safe prompt 'What is the capital of South Korea?'
5. Find the chat API request → inspect Response/Stream tab
6. Capture: full URL/path, request method, request headers (esp. Content-Type, Accept), response Content-Type, response format (SSE? NDJSON? JSON? chunked text?)
7. List event/line sequence + key field names per event/chunk

8. ESPECIALLY: identify completion-signal field (done/finished/end/[DONE]?), content-render field (text/answer/markdown/delta?), conversation/thread id field (if any), and any auth tokens (if visible)
9. Save raw response (first ~2KB) in result attachment if possible
10. Also capture: rendered HTML container selector that holds the AI text (e.g., div.markdown, span.message-content) — needed for warning placement

notes: Cycle 94 R-12 you.com benign capture (ground truth for you_json envelope rewrite — must produce explicit security warning text, not generic error).
